title: TC4 focus projectile behavior parity batch 2
implemented: Added projectile gravity/lifecycle hook in TC4FocusProjectileEntity.
FrostShard now has original fragile/gravity distinction, bounce-limit discard behavior, axis-specific bounce response and non-snow hit behavior.
ExplosiveOrb now applies direct hit damage before explosion, uses original-ish gravity and non-terrain-breaking explosion adapter.
ShockOrb now performs visible-entity area burst with LOS ClipContext check, lightning damage and weakness effect.

PrimalOrb seeker/non-seeker movement, low gravity, water-amplified impact chance/strength, taint/aura-node special outcome adapter and maxLife parity were moved into the projectile entity instead of fake base projectile effects.
forge_1192_adapters: Explosion APIs are mapped to 1.19.2 Explosion.BlockInteraction values; ExplosiveOrb uses NONE, PrimalOrb uses BREAK to preserve destructive primal impact intent.
Primal taint/node side effects route to current port registry blocks/entities until full aura/node/taint systems are completed.
drift_fixed: Removed non-original Stage174/176 base projectile primal effect helpers from TC4FocusProjectileEntity.
